attacking_style: Launches solo attacks from breakaway groups (not peloton) on climbing finales with 30-40km remaining. Shows persistence with multiple accelerations to eliminate chasers rather than single explosive moves.
team_tactics: Often operates without meaningful team support, forcing self-reliant attacks. When used as domestique (UAE 2023), deployed too early in race, leaving rider exposed when selection occurs.
terrain_preference: Excels on punchy climbing finales where all-rounder capabilities allow distancing pure sprinters. Struggles on sustained selective climbs in Ardennes-style races when already fatigued from early work.
vulnerability: Tactical mismanagement through excessive early-race workload. Unable to close gaps when chasing solo without team support. Dropped when real selection happens after depleting energy on domestique duties.
key_patterns: Solo attacks from established breakaways, not peloton attacks (Tour 2019 twice documented)
Multiple repeated accelerations to drop rivals rather than single decisive move (3 attacks, Tour 2019)
Operates without team support in critical moments, forced into energy-draining solo efforts (Omloop 2020, Tour 2019)
Misused tactically when serving domestique role, burned too early before decisive phase (UAE Amstel 2023)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 observation shows tactical mismanagement and inability to survive selections, suggesting declining status or poor team deployment compared to 2019 success
